name: Caitong Securities Co.,Ltd.
summary: Caitong Securities Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the securities brokerage business in China. The company operates in the securities brokerage, securities investment consulting, securities self-employment, securities underwriting and sponsorship, margin financing and securities lending, securities investment fund sales agency, agency sales of financial products, and other businesses. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
